name: claude-resume
title: Claude Resume
description: Browse every Claude Code session by its actual first prompt, then resume any one in iTerm2 or Terminal with a single keystroke. Reads the JSONL conversation logs under ~/.claude/projects directly, so every session shows up — not just the project directories.
author: gbechtold

commands.name: browse-sessions
commands.title: Browse and Resume
commands.subtitle: Claude Resume
commands.description: List every Claude Code session and resume the one you pick in iTerm or Terminal.

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal App
preferences.description: Which terminal app to open when resuming a session.

preferences.name: sessionLimit
preferences.title: Session Limit
preferences.description: Maximum number of sessions to load (10–500).

preferences.name: jsonlRootPath
preferences.title: JSONL Root Path
preferences.description: Where to look for Claude Code session JSONLs. Default: ~/.claude/projects.
